name: useScrollTop
description: A hook that tracks whether the page has been scrolled from the top, useful for sticky headers and scroll-based UI changes.
usage_guidelines: Automatically cleans up scroll listener on unmount.

isSticky.description: True if page has been scrolled (scrollY > 0), false otherwise.

Dont: Don't trigger expensive operations on every scroll
Don't forget to handle mobile scroll behavior
Don't use for precise scroll position tracking
